powers.name: Thaumaturgical Forensics
powers.description: The biothaumaturge reads the physiological history written into flesh and blood, learning how a body lived and died.
powers.system: The player rolls Perception + Medicine. Each success reveals one fact about the subject's physical history.

powers.name: Thaumaturgical Surgery
powers.description: The biothaumaturge reshapes living tissue, mending grievous wounds or working subtler alterations.
powers.system: The player rolls Intelligence + Medicine. The work takes one week per level of the effect.
